schools.name: MIT-WPU School of Design
schools.summary: The curricula are designed to create a balance between theoretical and practical learning. Students work on interdisciplinary projects that will combine science, technology and design to tackle real life problems. The School has professional equipment and software to aid in teaching. The School provides various workshops, seminars along with rural and national immersion for hands-on learning.

schools.name: MIT-WPU School of Engineering and Technology
MIT-WPU School of Computer Science & Engineering
schools.summary: Faculty bring academic and industry experience in areas ranging from software development and system design to machine learning and cybersecurity. The School supports experiential learning through immersive opportunities, internships, and research initiatives.

schools.name: MIT School of Government
schools.summary: The MIT School of Government (MIT-SOG) was created by Shri. Rahul V. Karad, Executive President of Dr. Vishwanath Karad MIT World Peace University, with the aim of producing ethical, passionate, and dedicated political leaders for the country from diverse backgrounds. Good political leadership from Panchayat to Parliament can only ensure good governance and vibrant democracy in a country with this thought.

schools.name: Ram Charan School of Leadership
schools.summary: The Ram Charan School of Leadership at MIT-WPU offers a comprehensive spectrum of business leadership programmes tailored to both students and seasoned professionals.

schools.name: MIT-WPU School of Business
schools.summary: The School of Business offers programmes covering the business world. The curriculum covers a wide spectrum of disciplines, ranging from management and marketing to finance and entrepreneurship.

schools.name: MIT-WPU School of Health Sciences & Technology
schools.summary: The curriculum spans medicine, engineering, biology and computer science. It instils a holistic understanding of the healthcare systems and promotes problem-solving skills. The School has built multiple partnerships with leading hospitals and research institutes, supporting hands-on and immersive learning.

schools.name: MIT-WPU School of Science & Environmental Studies
schools.summary: The School of Science and Environmental Studies at MIT-WPU offers a diverse range of programmes that combine the study of scientific principles with a focus on environmental sustainability. The School offers numerous specialisations in wildlife, sustainability and regulations. The School collaborates with industry and corporate organisations, research centres and NGOs to provide students with exposure to CSR and Environmental Civic Liability to understand the market trends and demands.

schools.name: MIT-WPU School of Liberal Arts
schools.summary: The curriculum spans an array of disciplines, from literature and philosophy to fim-making, media and communication, sociology, and the fine arts. What stands apart is that the school hosts a unique department for peace, that explores both traditional and contemporary peacebuilding approaches in today's conflict-ridden world.

schools.name: MIT-WPU School of Law
schools.summary: The School of Law at MIT-WPU was founded in 2018, marking a new chapter in the institution’s history. The School of Law focuses on a value-driven approach to legal education, incorporating interactive sessions, hands-on practical training, moot court competitions, classroom presentations, and industry-centric assignments.

schools.name: MIT-WPU School of Consciousness
schools.summary: The School of Consciousness studies consciousness through interdisciplinary research.

schools.name: Prof Makarand Hastak School of Construction Engineering and Management

departments.name: Department of Mechanical Engineering
departments.summary: The Department of Mechanical Engineering at MIT-WPU covers a wide range of disciplines, including design, thermodynamics, materials science, manufacturing processes, automation, and robotics. Students explore areas like e-mobility, bio-medical applications, aircraft, energy systems, and modern industrial processes, gaining a holistic view of mechanical engineering.

departments.name: Department of Chemical Engineering
departments.summary: The Department of Chemical Engineering at MIT-WPU offers a comprehensive blend of academics, experiential research, industrial training, and practical projects to prepare students for diverse careers. Graduates are equipped for roles in industries spanning petroleum refining, petrochemicals, polymers, biochemicals, biomedical devices, materials, drugs, fertilizers, dyes, textiles, ceramics, and foods.

departments.name: Department of Materials Science & Engineering
departments.summary: At the Department of Materials Science Engineering, MIT-WPU, students delve into the intricacies of designing and improving products, systems, and processes using an array of materials such as metals, polymers, ceramics, and more. The applications of Material Science Engineering span across diverse sectors, including medicine, agriculture, automation, electronics, and sports.

departments.name: Department of Electrical and Electronics Engineering
Department of Petroleum Engineering
departments.summary: The Department of Petroleum Engineering, the second oldest in India & the only one in Maharashtra, offers a distinctive B.Tech Petroleum Engineering with a specialised, industry-focused curriculum. This programme prepares students to tackle challenges & contribute to the nation’s energy security.

departments.name: Department of Computer Engineering and Technology
departments.summary: The ubiquity of digitisation in all aspects of life has led to a significant surge in Computer Science & Engineering. Skills related to innovation, design, development, deployment, usability, & presentation are highly sought after in the field of computer engineering & technology.

departments.name: Department of Computer Science and Applications
Department of Business
departments.summary: The residential BBA programs at MIT-WPU provide a comprehensive curriculum encompassing core, interdisciplinary, and elective courses, bolstered by skill-based certifications.

departments.name: Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences
departments.summary: Department of Pharmaceutical Sciences is consistently ranked amongst the top 100 institutions for Pharmacy in India for last five years by National Institutional Ranking Framework (NIRF), Ministry of Human Resource and Development.

departments.name: Department of Public Health
departments.summary: The Department of Public Health at MIT-WPU is dedicated to advancing knowledge and innovation in public health with a clear mission: ‘Health for all.’ The department focuses on educating students about the socio-economic disparities and their impact on the well-being of populations, as well as addressing public health sector needs in a sustainable manner.

departments.name: Department of Wellness and Yogic Science
departments.summary: The Department of Wellness and Yogic Science at the School of Health Science and Technologies, MIT-WPU offers a rewarding learning experience through its M.Sc Yoga and Meditation programme. The programme offers holistic education through a vibrant environment for academics, research, curricular and extracurricular activities.

departments.name: Department of Mathematics and Statistics
departments.summary: The Department of Mathematics and Statistics is a dynamic academic hub that embraces a holistic approach to education, integrating traditional quantitative disciplines with courses in peace studies and yoga. Our commitment extends beyond technical expertise, fostering the comprehensive development of students.

departments.name: Department of Biosciences and Technology
departments.summary: The Department of Biosciences & Technology offers industry-oriented undergraduate, postgraduate, and doctoral programmes that focus on contemporary and futuristic technical and scientific knowledge in the fields of biological sciences, and biotechnology.

departments.name: Department of Environmental Studies
departments.summary: The Department of Environmental Science at MIT-WPU has a resolute mission to cultivate the professionals of tomorrow, individuals who are dedicated to contributing towards the betterment of our planet through informed decision-making and active engagement in environmental preservation.

departments.name: Department of Visual Arts
departments.summary: The Department of Visual Arts at MIT-MIT-WPU School of Design offers a compelling array of undergraduate and postgraduate programmes meticulously tailored for aspiring creatives eager to establish their presence in the burgeoning creative sector.

departments.name: Department of Liberal Arts
departments.summary: The Department of Liberal Arts at MIT-WPU stands proudly among the top 100 institutes for Liberal Arts in India. Offering a diverse array of undergraduate and postgraduate degree programmes encompassing varied disciplines like English, Psychology, Political Science, and Liberal Arts, the department champions interdisciplinary knowledge and experiential learning.

departments.name: Department of Education
departments.summary: Updated on 13 Feb 2026 The Department of Education at MIT-WPU School of Education, MIT-WPU, is dedicated to moulding students into conscientious, mindful, and empathetic educators for the future. The forward-looking curriculum of the B.Ed. and M.Ed.

departments.name: Dadasaheb Phalke International Film Institute
departments.summary: Dadasaheb Phalke International Film Institute is established with the aim of training young India into building promising careers in the highest-grossing industries - Cinema, OTT, Digital Media, among others. The School focuses on teaching the art of filmmaking that challenges traditional stereotypes and provides a comprehensive education with an emphasis on the skills and knowledge needed to excel in the industry.

departments.name: Department of Peace Studies
departments.summary: The Department of Peace Studies at the MIT World Peace University, guided by UNESCO Chair Dr. Vishwanath Karad, offers a comprehensive and interdisciplinary programme that focuses on promoting, understanding, and sustaining peace. The programme emphasizes ethical leadership, innovative research, and community outreach. The curriculum integrates meditation to help students develop inner peace and resilience, and enhance their self-awareness and emotional intelligence.
